name: ShootZ
author: Poki
description: ShootZ is a 3D shooting game created by No Power-up. Become a sneaky sniper in a colorful universe and quickly shoot all of your targets, one enemy after another. But don't let the fast pace of ShootZ fool you: Concentration and careful aiming is as important as the amount of bullets you have left. Your points are calculated based on how efficient your sniping skills are. Make sure to pay attention to the special scenarios where you can eliminate two opponents in one shot. Are you ready for the most addictive shooting game of the year? How to play: Aim - (Hold) Left mouse button Shoot - (Release) Left mouse button About the creator: ShootZ was created by created by NoPowerup. Play their other games on Poki: Horse Shoeing , Idle Digging Tycoon and Traffic Rush!
